notes: v1.14.48 - LANDING REBUILT: retired the WebGL globe front-door and swapped in a baked half-world landing (matched to the phantom-halfworld-baked.html reference; 'make it look like a multi-million-dollar piece of hardware'). WHY: the baked Earth renders instantly with ZERO GPU/WebGL cost (the WebGL globe rendered dim, ate memory, and needed per-device tuning), directly serving the offline-iPad performance + glove-test doctrine. WHAT: (1) New scene = phantom-halfworld.jpg (123KB, 832x1248, external asset precached in sw.js) as #bg, a #rimglow atmosphere (red when offline), and an SVG #ov overlay (gold AUS-01 radials + cyan/violet regional mesh + soft-gradient packets with ZERO per-frame filter cost + pulsing AUS-01 node/label) locked to the image viewBox. (2) Design-token system on #boot: strict 4px spacing grid, integer ~1.25 type scale, exactly three tracking values, semantic one-hue-one-meaning color (nominal cyan / identity violet / critical red / home gold). (3) Tokenized top chrome: gradient .mark wordmark, subtitle, gradient rule, live telemetry readout (NETWORK via navigator.onLine, OFFLINE CACHE via Cache API - never hardcoded). (4) A single 132px glove-dial as the only touch target: counter-rotating deco rings, hold-to-charge progress ring (HOLD->ENTER), reduced-motion = single confirm-tap. SAFETY/INTEGRATION: every new class rule is scoped under #boot and all new @keyframes are hw-* namespaced (CSS-collision audit flagged .sub/.lbl/.val/.a/.b/.ready as app-used; ancestor-scoping neutralizes them; the audit MISSED keyframes - spin/warp would have collided app-wide). The dial's done() hands off to the real launch() (collapses #boot, reveals #app); the warp flash masks the swap. The old null-guarded phantomBoot wordmark hook is now dormant (harmless). The dial NEVER gates on network (offline-first); you can always enter. REMOVED: #boot pl-* DOM, the ~886-line WebGL globe inline script (HUBS/ARCS/GLSL/frame loop + MASK_B64 earth texture), and the pl-* landing CSS (carried a data-URI). KEPT (flagged for cleanup after device-confirm): phantom-night.webp file + its precache entry (now orphaned; left in case of revert to WebGL). Gates: node --check 3/3 PASS, hw CSS braces 58/58, surgical anchor-based splice (app CSS before line 10446 + app DOM after #boot untouched), three stamps lockstep v1.14.48, dct/sw CRLF + version.json LF. DEVICE-CHECK (John, iPhone, full close+reopen to clear SW cache): confirm the baked Earth + gold AUS-01 net + dial-to-enter; then we can drop phantom-night.webp and consider a .webp re-encode of the hero.
